name: Gmail Receipts
description: Exports up to 100 recent Gmail purchase receipts and travel confirmations using a local authenticated browser session.

scopes.label: Your purchase and travel confirmations
scopes.description: Recent Gmail messages matching purchases, flights, or tickets, including sender, subject, date, and preview text.

limits.description: The Desktop connector returns at most the 100 most recent Gmail rows matching the purchase and travel search.
